Title: Denver TRACON Airspace Redesign - Notice of Intent
nepa_document_summary__c: Notice of Intent to prepare an Environmental Impact Statement for the proposed Denver TRACON Airspace Redesign Project. Published in Federal Register Vol. 86 No. 49.

Title: Denver TRACON Airspace Redesign - Draft EIS
nepa_prepared_by__c: FAA Air Traffic Organization - Environmental Division
nepa_document_summary__c: Draft Environmental Impact Statement analyzing noise impacts on 340,000 residential units across 47 communities, air quality effects, environmental justice implications under EO 12898, and cumulative impacts with DEN expansion. Four alternatives analyzed including No Action.

Title: Denver TRACON Airspace Redesign - Final EIS
nepa_prepared_by__c: FAA Air Traffic Organization - Environmental Division
nepa_document_summary__c: Final Environmental Impact Statement incorporating 847 public comments received during 45-day comment period. Revised noise analysis includes updated 65 dB DNL contour maps for Preferred Alternative. Environmental justice analysis updated per CEQ and DOT environmental justice guidance.

Title: Denver TRACON Airspace Redesign - Record of Decision
nepa_prepared_by__c: FAA Western Service Center - Acting Regional Administrator
nepa_document_summary__c: Record of Decision selecting Alternative B (Modified RNAV/PBN Redesign with Noise Equity Provisions) as the preferred alternative. Includes mitigation commitments: noise monitoring program at 12 permanent stations, community noise ombudsman program, and voluntary soundproofing assistance for residences within 65 dB DNL.
